candidate_definition_hints.text: An audio-visual library supports processing audio and video files, a graphics library can load a variety 3D mesh file formats into a generic in-memory representation, and the core library of Gazebo Common contains functionality that spans Base64 encoding/decoding to thread pools.

source_repo_description: An audio-visual library supports processing audio and video files, a graphics library can load a variety 3D mesh file formats into a generic in-memory representation, and the core library of Gazebo Common contains functionality that spans Base64 encoding/decoding to thread pools.
